properties.description: Detects WMI being used for remote command execution and lateral movement
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/node:" or CommandLine|contains has "process call create" or CommandLine|contains has "/user:" or CommandLine|contains has "/password:" or CommandLine|contains has "Win32_Process") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-WmiMethod" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or CommandLine|contains has "gwmi" or CommandLine|contains has "Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Create" or CommandLine|contains has "-ComputerName" or CommandLine|contains has "-Credential") and Image endswith "\wmiprvse.exe" and ParentImage endswith "\svchost.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "cmd.exe /c" or CommandLine|contains has "powershell.exe -c" or CommandLine|contains has "rundll32.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "regsvr32.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "mshta.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "bitsadmin.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "certutil.exe") and CommandLine matches regex ".*\\\\[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}.*"
